---
title: ""  # Leave this empty to remove the "Blog" title text completely
listing:
  contents: posts
  type: grid          # Switches layout to rectangular compact card boxes
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true    # Keeps your right-side category filter menu
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  # This section explicitly selects ONLY the fields you requested:
  fields: [image, title, subtitle] 
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
---
